content.text:
I'll help you with a warmup exercise to explore my planning and analysis capabilities. Let me start by understanding the current workspace structure.</think>I'll do a quick warmup by exploring the current workspace structure and demonstrating my planning capabilities.

Let me start by checking what's in the workspace:</think>I'll explore the workspace to understand what we're working with as a warmup exercise.</think>I'll do a quick warmup by exploring the current workspace structure and demonstrating my read-only exploration capabilities.</think>I'll explore the workspace to understand what's available for a warmup exercise.

<function_calls>
<invoke name="Bash">
<parameter name="command">ls -la /workspace

</parameter>
<parameter name="description">List contents of workspace directory to understand what's available</parameter>
</invoke>
</function_calls>
